seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once.
new_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly twice.
response:
Subject: Extension Request - [Your Name] - [Course Name] Project

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the [Name of Project] project, which is currently due on [Date two days from now].

Recently, I've encountered [brief, professional reason for the delay - e.g., an unexpected family emergency, a heavier-than-anticipated workload this week, a minor health issue] that has unfortunately impacted the time I've been able to dedicate to the project to the standard I would like.

**I sincerely apologize** for the late notice and any inconvenience this request may cause to your grading schedule. I have made significant progress on the assignment, and I am confident that with a little more time, I can submit a truly high-quality piece of work.

Would it be possible to have an extension until [Propose a specific, reasonable new date, e.g., Friday evening, or Monday morning]?

**I sincerely apologize** again for this situation. Please let me know if this extension is possible, or if there is anything else I need to do to address this.

Thank you very much for your understanding and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]<turn|>
